title: Support for Unicode in SLE Connector
breadcrumbs: Support for Unicode in SLE Connector
text: Support for Unicode in SLE Connector The Uniface SLE connector supports the full Unicode range. You can enable Unicode support by: Using wide-character packing codes (such as W20). W packing codes are stored as UTF-8 and support the full Unicode range. Setting $DEF_CHARSET= UTF8. This also enables Unicode characters to be used in the SQL Workbench and the sql ProcScriptstatement. For more information, consult the SQLite documentation. Related Links Uniface Support for Unicode Uniface supports Unicode in the user interface, database storage and retrieval, sorting, case conversion, and data exchange. Uniface uses Unicode UTF-8 encoding for as its internal character set. $DEF_CHARSET Specify the default character set used for storing data in String fields with C packing code.
